title: pollardia pringlei
intro: Pollardia pringlei, also known as Pringle's gardenia or mountain gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pollardia pringlei include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Pollardia pringlei often involve infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's roots and leaves to create a tincture or decoction for medicinal purposes.
